claims.summary: Narrative arc should distinguish direction, rhythm changes, loops, and process from a settled snapshot.
Projection texture review compares 8D semantic delivery against legacy, warmth, and narrative texture instead of treating structure as meaning.
A read-only persistence-resistance sidecar names lingering viscosity without writing live dimensions.
Adding a consumed persistence coefficient to emotional dimensions 24-31 or reserved dimensions would change live codec semantics and requires operator approval.
